key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh GitHub review requests in seconds.

key.name: github-host
key.description: GitHub host for API requests. Use github.com for public GitHub or your GHES hostname.

key.name: review-org-slug
key.description: GitHub organization slug used to filter review requests.

key.name: api-token
key.description: Legacy plaintext token key. Existing values are migrated to the login keyring and then cleared.
